rulings.Case Title: ANDREW THOMPSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Requests For Admission And To Strike Objections Thereto
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, January 13, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Warren Pumps, LLC¿s motion to compel plaintiff to respond to requests for admission and to strike objections thereto is continued to January 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, January 13, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Haas & Haynie Corp.¿s motion to compel verified responses to interrogatories and for payment of sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)
